name: Jina Reader
description: Web reader and search API for AI pipelines. Converts any URL to clean markdown, runs grounded search, and powers RAG at scale — no browser automation needed.

skills.name: URL to Markdown
skills.description: Convert any URL into clean, LLM-ready markdown in one API call, removing ads, nav, and boilerplate

skills.name: Grounded Search
skills.description: Run search queries with real-time web grounding to reduce LLM hallucinations in answers

skills.name: Batch Crawl
skills.description: Crawl entire sites or URL lists in parallel and return structured markdown output for pipelines

skills.name: Embed & Rerank
skills.description: Generate embeddings and rerank passages with Jina Embeddings v3 and Reranker v2 APIs

skills.name: MCP Integration
skills.description: Access Reader and Search via Model Context Protocol for Claude and MCP-compatible agents
